attributes.title: Maps
attributes.description: We have all worked with these

post.html:
There is this common saying about interviews

Just use a hash map















What are maps?

its too easy to think of {} or new Map() and just assume we know them. The reality is that we know how to use them, most of the time we don't actually know they work.















Lets whiteboard what is happening

  • Insertion
  • Deletion
  • Collisions
  • Running Time
post.title: Maps
